bio:
有些人不是没天赋，只是没被看见 💎
AI 帮你精准匹配最适合的 3 个机会，告别海投
🇲🇾 马来西亚，求职者和招聘方都适用
tagline: 每个人都是一颗钻石，你只是还没遇见对的珠宝匠。

notes.name: RedNote rejects the '·' middle dot in nicknames — use a space. Name edits limited to 4 per 30 days.
notes.bio: RedNote strips external links from bio — no URL included. Bio edits limited to 3 per 7 days.
notes.avatar: Use the circular-by-design D&J logo (Logo.png) so the round crop fits — the plain wordmark gets clipped.
